features: TRIM NAILS PRECISELY with handsome KLIPP Nail Clippers for men. Featuring perfectly arched cutting edges made of high-quality stainless steel and tempered for lasting sharpness, these heavy-duty mens nail clippers make easy work of thick fingernails and toenails so you always look like a certified gent.

SELF-COLLECTING nail clippers feature a discreet catch tray where nail trimmings gather. Clip your nails in the bedroom, living room or at the office without leaving unsightly clippings in the bed lines, in the carpets or atop the desk. When finished, flip open the lid of the catch tray to dispose of clippings.

RUGGEDLY CONSTRUCTED of premium stainless steel and zinc alloy, KLIPP Fingernail and Toenail Clippers for men boast a sophisticated matte black finish. Rust resistant and with an ergonomically shaped clipping lever, these nail cutters will be an enduring addition to your pedicure and manicure tools.

TACKLE TOUGH NAILS on your fingers and your toes with these heavy duty nail clippers. Exceptionally sharp cutting edges and incredible leveraging properties combine to power through thick and overgrown nails with ease. Their arched shape helps remove ingrown toenails and relieve painful pressure from toes.

INCLUDED ZIPLOCK POUCH protects your KLIPP Mens Nail Trimmer and keeps it clean and hygienic between uses. These fingernail and toenail clippers can also be discreetly carried in your pocket for use anywhere a hangnail or broken nail occur. They measure just 20mm x 85.8mm.
